site.title: Cloud Adoption Guide for Aotearoa New Zealand
site.welcomeText: Plain-language resources for New Zealand organisations adopting Azure and Microsoft 365, with practical guidance on data residency, sovereignty, and the Azure New Zealand North region.

sections.title: Cloud Guidance
sections.description: Enterprise and government-focused cloud governance and architecture resources.

disclaimer.footer: Disclaimer: The opinions expressed herein are my own personal opinions and do not represent my employer's view in any way. Presentation Resources are provided as is with no guarantees or warranties of any kind.

collections.title: Cloud Resources
collections.subtitle: Azure & Microsoft Cloud — New Zealand
collections.description: Plain-language guides on Azure and Microsoft cloud topics for New Zealand organisations — data residency, data sovereignty, the Azure New Zealand North region, and more.

articles.title: Data Residency & Data Sovereignty — Summary
articles.description: A summary of data residency and data sovereignty options for Azure and Microsoft 365, tailored for New Zealand organisations.

articles.title: Data Residency & Data Sovereignty — Detail
articles.description: A detailed guide to data residency and sovereignty options across Microsoft 365 and Azure, with New Zealand context, legal considerations, and practical steps.

articles.title: Azure New Zealand North — Cloud Region Dossier
articles.description: A comprehensive dossier of the Azure New Zealand North region including available services, service rings, disaster recovery, compliance, latency, and pricing.

articles.title: Cloud Residency, Sovereignty, and NZ North — FAQ
articles.description: A unified FAQ for New Zealand organisations covering data residency, sovereignty, and the Azure New Zealand North region.

articles.title: Data Residency vs Data Sovereignty — Decisions to Make
articles.description: An objective comparison of data residency and sovereignty postures for New Zealand organisations, including trade-offs, costs, and risk implications.

collections.title: Copilot Learning
collections.subtitle: Getting Started with GitHub Copilot
collections.description: A practical learning path for GitHub Copilot — what it is, how to set it up, and how to get the most out of AI-assisted development.

articles.title: What is GitHub Copilot — Overview of Features and Capabilities
articles.description: A plain-language overview of GitHub Copilot, what it does, how it works, and the features available to developers today.

collections.title: Azure App Services
collections.subtitle: Hosting Web Apps & APIs on Azure — New Zealand
collections.description: Plain-language guides on Azure App Service for New Zealand organisations — hosting models, networking, data residency in the NZ North region, pricing, and deployment patterns.

articles.title: Getting Started with Azure App Service
articles.description: A plain-language introduction to Azure App Service: what it is, hosting tiers, networking, data residency in NZ North, pricing, and common architecture patterns.
